mapper.select: SELECT m_idx, name, description, category, price, ice_extra_price AS icePrice, size_upcharge_grande AS sizeUpchargeGrande, size_upcharge_venti AS sizeUpchargeVenti, image_url AS imageUrl, story, origin, available FROM menu_t WHERE available = 1 AND category = #{_parameter} ORDER BY FIELD(category,'ESPRESSO','COFFEE','LATTE','NONCOFFEE','TEA','ADE','SMOOTHIE','FRAPPE','SPECIAL','DESSERT'), price ASC, m_idx ASC

SELECT m_idx, name, description, category, price, ice_extra_price AS icePrice, size_upcharge_grande AS sizeUpchargeGrande, size_upcharge_venti AS sizeUpchargeVenti, image_url AS imageUrl, story, origin, available FROM menu_t WHERE m_idx = #{m_idx}

SELECT m_idx, name, description, category, price, ice_extra_price AS icePrice, size_upcharge_grande AS sizeUpchargeGrande, size_upcharge_venti AS sizeUpchargeVenti, image_url AS imageUrl, story, origin, available FROM menu_t WHERE name = #{name} AND available = 1 LIMIT 1
